title: 「whereas」對比句

omissions: The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formulas.formula: Subject 1 + verb + information, whereas + Subject 2 + verb + contrasting information

example: Short-term popularity matters to some brands, whereas long-term trust matters more to others.
exampleZh: 有些品牌重視短期人氣，而另一些品牌則更重視長遠信任。

examples.en: Short-term popularity matters to some brands, whereas long-term trust matters more to others.
examples.zh: 有些品牌重視短期人氣，而另一些品牌則更重視長遠信任。
examples.highlight: Short-term popularity matters to some brands, whereas long-term trust matters more to others.

examples.en: Some customers care about price. Other customers care about quality.
examples.zh: 有些顧客重視價格。另一些顧客重視質素。
examples.highlight: Some customers care about price. Other customers care about quality.

examples.en: Some customers care about price, whereas others care about quality.
examples.zh: 有些顧客重視價格，而另一些顧客則重視質素。
examples.highlight: Some customers care about price, whereas others care about quality.

rules.en: Whereas joins two complete clauses. Each side normally needs its own subject and verb.
rules.zh: whereas 連接兩個完整子句。兩邊通常都要有自己的主語和動詞。

rules.en: Use a comma before whereas when it appears between the two clauses.
rules.zh: whereas 放在兩個子句中間時，前面要加逗號。

rules.en: Use whereas to show a clear contrast, not a reason, result or time relationship.
rules.zh: whereas 用來表達清楚的對比。它不是用來表達原因、結果或時間。

rules.en: Compare related points, such as two people, objects, periods or approaches.
rules.zh: 兩邊應比較相關的資料。例如兩個人、兩件物件、兩個時段或兩種做法。

rules.en: This exercise uses only the following order: Clause A, whereas Clause B.
rules.zh: 本練習只使用以下句序：Clause A, whereas Clause B.

benefits.en: It makes the difference easy to see. This structure places two different facts side by side, so the reader can understand the contrast immediately.
benefits.zh: 這個句型把兩項不同的資料並列，讓讀者立即看出兩者的分別。

benefits.en: It joins two short ideas smoothly. Instead of writing two separate sentences, you can connect them in one complete sentence.
benefits.zh: 你可以把兩個短句連成一個完整句子，令表達更連貫。

benefits.en: It gives you an alternative to but and however. You can use whereas as another way to express contrast, especially in explanations and writing. This helps you avoid repeating the same connectors.
benefits.zh: 你可以使用 whereas 以另一種方式表達對比，尤其適合用於解釋和寫作，避免反覆使用相同的連接詞。

benefits.en: It helps you present two sides fairly. The structure is useful when comparing two people, choices, views or situations without automatically saying that one side is wrong.
benefits.zh: 比較兩個人、選擇、觀點或情況時，這個句型能讓你較平衡地呈現雙方，而不是直接把其中一方說成錯誤。

benefits.en: It helps organise essays, reports and presentations. The reader can clearly see which point belongs to the first side and which point belongs to the second side.
benefits.zh: 在作文、報告和簡報中，讀者可以清楚分辨哪項資料屬於第一方，哪項資料屬於第二方。

sourceOmissions: The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence or pair of sentences using whereas to show a clear contrast.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 whereas 改寫以下句子或句子組合，以清楚表達對比。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia likes tea, but Leo prefers coffee.

questions.answer: The council plans to plant more trees in the town centre, whereas local businesses are asking for additional loading areas.
questions.answerZh: 議會計劃在市中心種植更多樹木，而本地商戶則要求增設上落貨區。
questions.highlight: The council plans to plant more trees in the town centre, whereas local businesses are asking for additional loading areas.

questions.prompt: Solar panels produce the most power on bright days. Household demand, however, often rises after sunset.
questions.promptZh: 太陽能板在陽光充足的日子產生最多電力。不過，家庭用電需求通常在日落後上升。
questions.answer: Solar panels produce the most power on bright days, whereas household demand often rises after sunset.
questions.answerZh: 太陽能板在陽光充足的日子產生最多電力，而家庭用電需求則通常在日落後上升。
questions.highlight: Solar panels produce the most power on bright days, whereas household demand often rises after sunset.

questions.prompt: The automatic system can process simple requests. Complex cases still require human judgement.
questions.promptZh: 自動系統能處理簡單要求。複雜個案仍然需要人為判斷。
questions.answer: The automatic system can process simple requests, whereas complex cases still require human judgement.
questions.answerZh: 自動系統能處理簡單要求，而複雜個案則仍然需要人為判斷。
questions.highlight: The automatic system can process simple requests, whereas complex cases still require human judgement.

questions.prompt: Some schools use examinations to measure progress, while other schools rely more heavily on projects and classwork.
questions.promptZh: 有些學校以考試衡量進度，而另一些學校則更依賴專題研習和課堂習作。
questions.answer: Some schools use examinations to measure progress, whereas others rely more heavily on projects and classwork.
questions.answerZh: 有些學校以考試衡量進度，而另一些學校則更依賴專題研習和課堂習作。
questions.highlight: Some schools use examinations to measure progress, whereas others rely more heavily on projects and classwork.

questions.prompt: The first proposal could be introduced quickly. By contrast, the alternative would require more time and benefit more residents.
questions.promptZh: 第一項建議可以迅速推行。相比之下，另一個方案需要更多時間，並能惠及更多居民。
questions.answer: The first proposal could be introduced quickly, whereas the alternative would require more time and benefit more residents.
questions.answerZh: 第一項建議可以迅速推行，而另一個方案則需要更多時間，並能惠及更多居民。
questions.highlight: The first proposal could be introduced quickly, whereas the alternative would require more time and benefit more residents.

questions.prompt: Low prices matter most to some customers. Dependable service matters more to other customers.
questions.promptZh: 有些顧客最重視低廉價格。另一些顧客則更重視可靠的服務。
questions.answer: Low prices matter most to some customers, whereas dependable service matters more to others.
questions.answerZh: 有些顧客最重視低廉價格，而另一些顧客則更重視可靠的服務。
questions.highlight: Low prices matter most to some customers, whereas dependable service matters more to others.
